# init()

**Initializer**

Creates a new source text position at the beginning of the source text.

## Declaration

```swift
init()
```

## Creating Source Text Positions

- **init(line:column:)**: Creates a source text position at the specified line and column.

items.description: Creates a source text position at the specified line and column.
items.name: init(line:column:)
